title: verbascum × sibyllinum
intro: Verbascum × sibyllinum, also known as Sibthorp's Groundsel, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus. It is characterized by its tall spikes of yellow flowers and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to provide health benefits such as soothing sore throats and reducing coughs. Sibthorp's Groundsel can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for various health remedies.
